identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Tactical Minimal' Cyber Security learning environment that feels like a hacker's terminal but functions like a high-end learning tool.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Swiss Style' precision with 'Cyberpunk' atmosphere.
Emotion First: The user should feel like an elite operator, not a student.
Content is King: Data and text legibility is paramount. Dark mode must not strain eyes.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to separate data clusters.
Contrast: High-visibility neon accents against deep matte backgrounds.
anti_patterns: No pure black (#000000) backgrounds without texture or tint.
No generic 'Inter' for headings. Use technical/display fonts.
No 'Bootstrap' grid layouts. Use bento/asymmetrical grids.
No soft, mushy shadows. Use sharp, technical borders and glows.

items.risk_overview: col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2 bg-surface border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-lg
items.weakest_concepts: col-span-full md:col-span-4 row-span-2 bg-surface border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-lg
items.session_history: col-span-full bg-surface border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-lg

auth_page.name: Split Terminal
auth_page.left_panel: hidden md:flex w-1/2 bg-black items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden
auth_page.right_panel: w-full md:w-1/2 flex items-center justify-center bg-zinc-950 p-8

cards.classes: bg-[#161b22]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl hover:border-brand-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

primary.classes: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#33EAFF] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-200 clip-path-polygon-[0_0,100%_0,100%_80%,90%_100%,0_100%]
primary.note: Use a subtle clip-path or sharp edges for a tactical feel.

secondary.classes: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-mono hover:bg-white/5 px-6 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors

inputs.classes: bg-black/50 border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-0 text-white placeholder-gray-600 px-4 py-3 font-mono transition-colors rounded-t-md

risk_badge.high: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-mono
risk_badge.medium: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400 border border-yellow-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-mono
risk_badge.low: bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-mono

visual_enhancers.scanlines: background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.03) 3px); pointer-events: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 50;

dashboard_bg.description: Abstract network nodes for dashboard background (low opacity overlay)

auth_side_image.description: Tech text/code overlay for auth page side panel

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'framer-motion' for simple entrance animations (fade-in, slide-up).
Ensure all text is legible against the dark background. Increase contrast if needed.
Implement the 'Scanlines' visual enhancer as a global CSS class or component.
Use the 'Space Grotesk' font for headings if possible (via Google Fonts), otherwise fallback to standard sans but bold.
For the 'Risk Score', use a circular progress indicator or a 'Health Bar' style visual.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications with a dark theme customization.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not use rounded-full buttons unless it's a specific 'pill' style tag.
Prefer sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md, rounded-sm) corners for a 'tech' feel.
Always add hover states to interactive elements.
